Class UserService

java.lang.Object
hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.UserService
public class UserService extends Object
Handles business logic for user management including registration, sign in, profile editing, password changes and account deletion.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    changePassword(String currentPassword, String newPassword, String confirmNewPassword)
    Changes the logged in user's password.
    static void
    deleteUserAccount()
    Permanently deletes the logged in user's account.

    Validates and updates the logged in user's profile.

    Validates and registers a new user.

  • Method Details

    • getLoggedInUser

      public static User getLoggedInUser()

    • setLoggedInUser

      public static void setLoggedInUser(User loggedInUser)

    • register

      public static void register(UserRegistrationForm userRegistrationForm)
      Validates and registers a new user. Hashes the password before saving.
      Parameters:
      userRegistrationForm - the registration form data
      Throws:
      UserValidationException - if validation fails or the username is already taken

    • signIn

      public static void signIn(String username, String password)
      Signs in a user with the given credentials. Sets the logged in user on success.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to sign in with
      password - the password to verify
      Throws:
      UserValidationException - if credentials are invalid or the user does not exist

    • editProfile

      public static void editProfile(UserEditProfileForm userEditProfileForm)
      Validates and updates the logged in user's profile. Requires the current password to confirm changes.
      Parameters:
      userEditProfileForm - the updated profile data
      Throws:
      UserValidationException - if validation fails, the username is taken, or the password is incorrect

    • changePassword

      public static void changePassword(String currentPassword, String newPassword, String confirmNewPassword) throws PasswordChangeException
      Changes the logged in user's password. Verifies the current password before applying the change.
      Parameters:
      currentPassword - the user's current password
      newPassword - the new password to set
      confirmNewPassword - must match the new password
      Throws:
      PasswordChangeException - if validation fails or the current password is incorrect

    • deleteUserAccount

      public static void deleteUserAccount()
      Permanently deletes the logged in user's account. Also deletes all their transactions and categories.
